Video.summary: Frankly my dear, guest star Richard Chamberlain gives it his all in "Gone With The Breeze".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford

Image.alt: Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford

Video.summary: Harvey Korman guests. Features a number about glory & crisis of mid-life. On "Carol & Sis", Carol goes gaga.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Stars Mel Torme, Nanette Fabray, and Don Rickles pitch in to help tell "The Tin Pan Alley Story".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Image.alt: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Video.summary: Guests John Davidson and Ross Martin appear in "The Helen Feibelbaum Story", a spoof of celebrity biopics.
Video.title: Ross Martin, John Davidson

Video.summary: Frank Gorshin dazzles with his famous impressions, then joins up with Lana Turner in a sketch about Bluebeard.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Frank Gorshin, Lana Turner

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway plays a prison warden responding to a riot, and a suitor whose test reaction causes havoc.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell & Ken Berry join in "High Hat", a spoof of Fred Astaire and Ginger Rogers movie musicals.
Video.title: Roddy McDowell, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Sketches include an encounter at a bar between Harvey & Carol, and Carol & Vicki as "Lucky Lady" contestants.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence stars in a take-off on film "Double Indemnity"..here named "Double Calamity", with Carol too.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Phyllis Diller guests. Also, "Dr. Jeckyl and Mr. Hyde" and Bobbie Gentry singing "The Look Of Love."
Video.title: Bobbie Gentry, Phyllis Diller

Video.summary: Marty Feldman & Carol Channing guest. Features an airline crew who causes havoc, and wacky commercial spoofs.
Video.title: Marty Feldman, Carol Channing

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell guest stars! He plays a member of "The Family." Also: movie spoof "The Lady Heir."
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, and David Frost join Carol for an Italian-style production of Cinderella.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost

Image.alt: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost

Video.summary: As The Oldest Conductor, Tim Conway leads the Sydney Orchestra.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous

Image.alt: Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous
Tim Conway, Ed Villella, Lucette Aldous

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray appears on "As The Stomach Turns." Also featured: "Carol & Sis" go gaga over Roger's briefcase.
Video.title: Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: John Byner & Helen Reddy join Carol in a sketch about swingers. Also, The Family plays a game of "Sorry!"
Video.title: John Byner, Helen Reddy

Video.summary: Shecky Greene & Eydie Gorme join for a rundown of TV programs. Also: "Carol & Sis" & "Ironstreet & Wife."
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Shecky Greene

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell and The Jackson 5 guest star!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Roddy McDowall, Jackson Five

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars with Carol as unsuccessful Western movie stars in "The Saga Of Lily And Billy."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dionne Warwick, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray and Mel Torme lend their star power to a show-biz spectacle: the movie spoof, "43rd Street."
Video.title: Mel Torme, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Guest Robert Goulet joins Q&A. Sketches include the aftermath of a party, and a maid entranced by a star.
Video.title: Robert Goulet

Video.summary: Tim and Carol are conventioneers double booked in a hotel room.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Edie Adams, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Nanette Fabray & Joan Rivers guest! Featuring Rivers' comedy, a "V.I.P." interview, and a talk show segment.
Video.title: Eydie Gorme, Joan Rivers

Video.summary: Tim Conway stars! Tim will make you laugh as the World's Oldest Clockmaker, and as Ed's pal in "The Family."
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Mel Torme guest star! Martha appears in "The Sunday Painters". Mel and Martha join parodies.
Video.title: Martha Raye, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Mrs. Wiggins attends a convention with Mr. Tudball! And, saluting the year in TV commercials with Ben Vereen.
Video.title: Ben Vereen

Video.summary: Tim Conway guests for a sketch where a betrothed couple elect to paint their future home-with messy results.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Tim Conway plays a 35 year old orphan looking to be adopted.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Jack Cassidy

Video.summary: The season finale features the regular cast, highlighting Carol's performance as the girlfriend of a producer.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Gwen Verdon and Pat Boone appear in "As The Stomach Turns." Also: Carol plays an actress with the flu.
Video.title: Gwen Verdon, Pat Boone

Video.summary: Eydie Gorme & Tim Conway guest, with Tim in a spy spoof "Dr. Nose." Eydie leads a number about a baby.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Rock Hudson and Nancy Walker join for sketch set in the days of vaudeville, "When My Baby Laughs At Me."
Video.title: Rock Hudson, Nancy Walker

Video.summary: Guest star Steve Lawrence sings a duet with Dick, while Tim cracks jokes and a case as Danny Draft.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Rita Moreno guest stars, appearing in a sketch as a nurse. Also featured: Tim as a hapless officer.
Video.title: Rita Moreno

Video.summary: Joel Grey & Vincent Price guest. They play guests at a hotel where Carol is the operator. Also "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Joel Grey, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Paul Lynde & Nanette Fabray join commercial outtakes! "Carol & Sis" finds Carol filling in for a secretary.
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: The Family steps out as Mama, Eunice, and Ed go to a restaurant, and Tim's "Oldest Man" is a sheriff.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Garry Moore and Durward Kirby guest. Sketches include Carol as a princess and a look at the Safety Committee.
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby
